title: citrus × junos
intro: Citrus × junos, also known as yuzu, is a hybrid citrus plant that is a cross between a mandarin and an ichang papeda. The yuzu plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of yuzu include lowering blood pressure, reducing stress and anxiety, and aiding in digestion, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Yuzu can be used in various herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
